full_text:
Deng Dang 鄧當
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Deng Dang (鄧當). Fought against the Shanyu under Sun Ce. Tried to persuade a young Lü Meng to stay home. Deng Dang was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Deng Dang lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
